strengths: Directly involved in AI-agent infrastructure and tooling (MCP code generators, agentic workflows) in a current production role, directly matching core AI responsibilities.
Demonstrated experience in fintech (RIDE Capital, Optilyz) including investment practices and pricing optimization, indicating familiarity with regulated, high-stakes financial environments.
Extensive background in designing and operating high-throughput, low-latency microservices and event-driven systems crucial for real-time data processing needs.
concerns: Resume primarily highlights senior individual contributor roles, lacking explicit evidence of executive-level team scaling (10-30+ people) or developing a senior technical leadership layer.

While working with agentic workflows, specific depth in LLM selection, fine-tuning, evaluation methodologies, and detailed AI-system reliability aspects (e.g., rate limits, fallback) is not explicitly demonstrated.
No clear experience designing and governing hybrid engineering models with external delivery partners, a stated required qualification.
response.justification: Bogdan presents a compelling technical profile, marked by his current hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure in production and a strong background in fintech, including investment practices in Germany. His deep expertise in building and operating high-throughput, low-latency distributed and event-driven systems also directly aligns with the technical demands of the role. While his resume emphasizes senior individual contributor achievements rather than explicit executive-level team scaling or management, his direct relevance to the core technical and industry challenges warrants further consideration.
